clues: Some network features on a Windows computer have stopped working unexpectedly.
The user can browse the internet but certain internal applications fail.
Network discovery and file sharing between Windows computers are not functioning.
The network adapter properties show that 'Internet Protocol Version 6 (TCP/IPv6)' is unchecked.
Disabling IPv6 on Windows can cause several network-dependent services to fail.
